name: X-Golf Blaine
about: X-Golf Blaine is a golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators with unparalleled accuracy and realism. Utilizing a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software, it provides a premium golfing experience suitable for all ages and skill levels. The venue operates on a per-simulator-hour basis, with flexible pricing structures, and features a full bar, lounge area, and private event spaces for group outings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Accurate and realistic gameplay experience across multiple golf courses
Full bar and food options available on-site for a complete entertainment experience
Private event space accommodating up to 60 guests for corporate and social gatherings
Flexible booking options including hourly rates and annual memberships

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a food menu including signature pizzas and other bites.
Full liquor bar with craft beer available on-site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site if you do not have your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted as X-Golf Blaine has a full kitchen and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For groups, it is recommended to book an additional hour per player.

faq.question: Is X-Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Blaine.
